memory._comment: Auto-memory disabled per s88 architecture decision. Workflow is mobile-first; auto-memory is laptop-filesystem-only and would not sync across surfaces. Family-related dynamic learnings live in Firestore players/{name}.coach_notes — see references/coach-notes-schema.md.

firebase._comment: Install via Anthropic plugin marketplace. Provides firestore_get_documents, firestore_query, firestore_set, firestore_update, firestore_delete, firebase_realtime_database_get_data (for legacy frozen RTDB reads if needed).

tools._comment: Default tool permissions. Firebase MCP plugin tools are auto-enabled when plugin loads. Bash/file editing tools always available.
